mapper.sql: plan_id, intersection_id, plan_name, cycle_time, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM signal_plan WHERE intersection_id = #{intersectionId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE signal_plan SET intersection_id = #{intersectionId}, plan_name = #{planName}, cycle_time = #{cycleTime}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
